name: explore
description: Marketplace for the explore plugin — a read-only senior architect-advisor that maps a codebase into a system design reference and, via feature flags, audits, plans, and reviews.

plugins.name: explore
plugins.description: Explore, understand, and improve a codebase as a read-only senior architect-advisor, driven by feature flags. Charts a durable system design reference (diagrams, ADRs, risk map); flags add audit-and-plan, single-task planning, security review, executor dispatch, agent-context init, and budget-aware resumable runs.
